name: French Bread #4
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Black & Decker
Here my favourite French Bread Recipe that came with my Black & Decker All-In-One Plus Automatic Breadmaker
1. Measure the ingredients into the baking pan.
2. Insert the baking pan securely into the unit and close the lid.
3. Select the appropriate bread setting (on mine it is setting 6).
4. Press start.
Makes 1 large loaf
Note: I use Fleischmann's bread machine yeast and haven't had any problems.
